scripts.fetch:openapi: dotenv -e .env.local -e .env -- sh -c 'mkdir -p packages/api-contract && curl -s -H "apikey: $SUPABASE_ANON_KEY" -H "Authorization: Bearer $SUPABASE_ANON_KEY" -H "Accept: application/openapi+json" "$SUPABASE_URL/rest/v1/" > packages/api-contract/openapi.json'
scripts.gen:contracts: pnpm gen:openapi:v3 && pnpm gen:zod && pnpm gen:ts
scripts.gen:db-types: mkdir -p packages/db-types && supabase gen types typescript --local > packages/db-types/index.ts
scripts.gen:all: pnpm gen:db-types && pnpm dump:supabase && pnpm fetch:openapi && pnpm gen:contracts
scripts.db:push:prod: dotenv -e .env.prod -e .env -- sh -c 'SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF="$SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF_PROD" SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN="$SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN_PROD" node scripts/set-project-ref.js; if [ -z "$SUPABASE_DB_URL_PROD" ]; then echo "SUPABASE_DB_URL_PROD is required for prod push" && exit 1; fi; SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN="$SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN_PROD" supabase db push --db-url "$SUPABASE_DB_URL_PROD" --dns-resolver https'
